_comment: The allowlist IS the rule. A reviewer id that is not in this file cannot
sign off an entry, and no model, agent, or pipeline may be added here.
Adding a name to this file should require a second pair of eyes on the PR.
'lang' is what they are native in and therefore allowed to approve.
'verifier' = allowed to appear in sources[].verifiedBy (opened the page).
'reviewer' = allowed to appear in review.esReviewer / review.itReviewer.
